summary: A major EU economy and NATO member with historical global empire, now navigating regional separatism (Catalonia, Basque Country), a large tourism sector, and a strategic gateway between Europe, Africa, and Latin America.

history.detail: Beginning of Spanish empire; vast territories in Americas and Pacific.
Naval defeat to England; start of imperial decline.
Cuba, Puerto Rico, Philippines lost to USA; end of empire.
Republicans vs Nationalists (Franco); dress rehearsal for WWII.
Francisco Franco rules until death in 1975.
Spain integrates into Western security structures.
Property bubble collapse; 26% unemployment at peak.

resources.water: Severe stress; droughts worsening in south
resources.agriculture: Olive oil world leader; wine, tomatoes, citrus
resources.rare_earths: Some rare earth deposits in Extremadura

follow_the_money.detail: Santander, BBVA, Telefónica dominate Latin American markets

connections.detail: NATO ally; Morón and Rota US bases
Historical and cultural ties; major investment
